name: @nebutra/design-sync
description: Provider-agnostic design-tool sync. Figma + Tokens Studio | Penpot | git-only | memory.

requires: FIGMA_PERSONAL_ACCESS_TOKEN + FIGMA_FILE_ID for Figma + Tokens Studio
or PENPOT_API_URL + PENPOT_TOKEN for Penpot (self-hostable, China-friendly)
or nothing — git-only is the zero-config default
gaps: Figma push (Variables REST API) is dry-run; manual enable required
Penpot adapter implements healthcheck + pull; push is dry-run scaffolding
No real-time webhook listeners (manual pull/push only)
